heading: Definitions
label: 8701 Definitions

L. 99–634, § 2(a)100 Stat. 3523Sept. 2, 1960Nov. 7, 1986In this section, the text of 41:52(3) is omitted because of the definition of “person” in 1:1.In paragraph (2), the words “directly or indirectly” are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—Contracting agency
children.label: 1 .—Contracting agency
children.text: The term “contracting agency”, when used with respect to a prime contractor, means a department, agency, or establishment of the Federal Government that enters into a prime contract with a prime contractor.

children.heading: .—Kickback
children.label: 2 .—Kickback
children.text: The term “kickback” means any money, fee, commission, credit, gift, gratuity, thing of value, or compensation of any kind that is provided to a prime contractor, prime contractor employee, subcontractor, or subcontractor employee to improperly obtain or reward favorable treatment in connection with a prime contract or a subcontract relating to a prime contract.

children.heading: .—Person
children.label: 3 .—Person
children.text: The term “person” means a corporation, partnership, business association of any kind, trust, joint-stock company, or individual.

children.heading: .—Prime contract
children.label: 4 .—Prime contract
children.text: The term “prime contract” means a contract or contractual action entered into by the Federal Government to obtain supplies, materials, equipment, or services of any kind.

children.heading: .—Prime contractor
children.label: 5 .—Prime contractor
children.text: The term “prime contractor” means a person that has entered into a prime contract with the Federal Government.

children.heading: .—Prime contractor employee
children.label: 6 .—Prime contractor employee
children.text: The term “prime contractor employee” means an officer, partner, employee, or agent of a prime contractor.

children.heading: .—Subcontract
children.label: 7 .—Subcontract
children.text: The term “subcontract” means a contract or contractual action entered into by a prime contractor or subcontractor to obtain supplies, materials, equipment, or services of any kind under a prime contract.

children.label: A
children.text: means a person, other than the prime contractor, that offers to furnish or furnishes supplies, materials, equipment, or services of any kind under a prime contract or a subcontract entered into in connection with the prime contract; and

children.label: B
children.text: includes a person that offers to furnish or furnishes general supplies to the prime contractor or a higher tier subcontractor.

children.heading: .—Subcontractor employee
children.label: 9 .—Subcontractor employee
children.text: The term “subcontractor employee” means an officer, partner, employee, or agent of a subcontractor.
